name: changelogger
title: Changelogger
description: Generate AI changelogs from selected GitHub commits and save them to a local SQLite history.
author: Pascual_Chavez

commands.name: new-changelog
commands.title: New Changelog
commands.subtitle: Changelogger
commands.description: Pick a repository and commits, then generate a changelog with Raycast AI.

commands.name: history
commands.title: Changelog History
commands.subtitle: Changelogger
commands.description: Browse, copy, or delete previously generated changelogs.

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
preferences.description: Read-only token. Use scope 'public_repo' for public repos, or 'repo' for private repo read access.

preferences.name: commitsPerPage
preferences.title: Commits Per Page
preferences.description: How many commits to load per request.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
